title: Bridge Essay: Dynamic brain states underlying advanced concentrative absorption meditation: A

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Formless/Absorption** (Phase 8) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Formless/Absorption to mechanistic neuroscience.

**Dynamic brain states underlying advanced concentrative absorption meditation: A 7-T fMRI-intensive case study.** — Netw Neurosci. PMID: 40161981. DOI: 10.1162/netn_a_00432. Advanced meditation consists of states and stages of practice that unfold with mastery and time. Dynamic functional connectivity (DFC) analysis of fMRI could identify brain states underlying advanced meditation. We conducted an intensive DFC case study of ameditator who completed 27 runs of jhāna advanced absorptive concentration meditation (ACAM-J), concurrently with 7-T fMRI and phenomenological reporting. We identified three brain states that marked differences between ACAM-Jand nonmeditati
